reviews.comment:
Un parador imperdible. A metros de la autopista Buenos aires _ Rosario, en salida Río tala, San Pedro, de encuentra esta pintoresca estación, con muy buena atención y una pastelería muy muy rica. Además de un entorno verde donde pasar un muy buen descanso. Que más queres? 🙂

(Translated by Google)
A must-see rest stop. Just meters from the Buenos Aires-Rosario highway, at the Río Tala exit in San Pedro, you'll find this charming station with excellent service and delicious pastries. Plus, a lovely green setting perfect for a relaxing break. What more could you want? 🙂
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2c3Bfa3BRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Paramos para descansar un poco del viaje. Tiene un espacio verde muy grande, para poder descansar al aire libre.
Usamos los baños y estaban muy limpios, había papel y jabón.
La carga de aire para las ruedas es gratuita lo cual es muy importante.
Podes usar el espacio exterior sin consumir en el lugar, también esto es importante destacar.
Esta todo muy bien mantenido.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to rest a bit from the trip. There's a large green space where we could relax outdoors.
We used the bathrooms, and they were very clean; there was toilet paper and soap.
Tire inflation is free, which is very important.
You can use the outdoor space without consuming anything on site, which is also important to note.
Everything is very well maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQNE8yRG1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
El peor servicio, no se para q pago ser socio ACA si cada vez brindan peor servicio, hoy 10 de noviembre siendo las 22:10 el playero ni hola, una cara de mejor perderlo q encontrarlo y nos atendió con la peor mala onda.

(Translated by Google)
The worst service ever. I don't know why I pay to be an ACA member if they keep providing worse service. Today, November 10th, at 10:10 PM, the attendant didn't even say hello, he had a face that said, "Better to lose him than find him," and he served us with the worst attitude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQzd0xpWk9BEAE
